s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR BUMPER ASSEMBLY (w/o Rear Lower Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the rear bumper assembly.
Using a screwdriver, open the 2 rear bumper plates.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Remove the 6 screws and 2 clips.
Disengage the 12 claws and disconnect the rear bumper assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear bumper assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR FLOOR BOARD (w/ Rear Lower Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws, 2 clips, 3 nuts and rear floor board.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR BUMPER ASSEMBLY (w/ Rear Lower Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Put protective tape around the rear bumper assembly.
Using a screwdriver, open the 2 rear bumper plates.

atten4.ptxt: Tape the screwdriver tip before use.

s2.ptxt: Remove the 6 screws.
Disengage the 12 claws and disconnect the rear bumper assembly as shown in the illustration.

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.

s2.ptxt: Remove the rear bumper assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT SIDE TRAY ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt.
Disengage the clip and remove the luggage compartment side tray assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 LUGGAGE COMPARTMENT TRIM HOOK

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 screws and the 2 No. 1 luggage compartment trim hooks.
Disengage the 7 clips and remove the rear floor finish plate.
Disconnect the 2 connectors and clamp.
Remove the 3 nuts.
Disengage the clip and remove the rear combination light assembly.
Using a clip remover, remove the 13 clips and luggage compartment door cover.
Disconnect the connector and clamp.
Remove the 3 nuts.
Disengage the pin and remove the rear light assembly.

atten4.ptxt: Be careful not to break the engaging portion of the pin when removing the rear light assembly.
